response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:04: Performer greeting and artifact discussion. 2. 01:04-01:19: Performer sings 'Mirai no Kimi ni'. Search for lyrics was inconclusive. 3. 01:20-04:53: Collaboration announcement. 4. 04:53-05:00: Performance of 'Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm'. Identified as SMAP song, composed by Yasutaka Nakata. Found full Japanese lyrics via search.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing a VTuber (Juufutei Raden) announcing a collaboration with the Tokyo National Museum, featuring two vocal music segments.

scenes.description: The performer, Juufutei Raden, introduces a specific artifact and talks about an upcoming exhibition at the Tokyo National Museum.
A brief vocal performance of a song titled 'Mirai no Kimi ni'.
The performer explains the details of the 'Genji Monogatari' collaboration exhibition.
The song 'Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm' plays, performed by the VTuber. Credits on-screen credit Yasutaka Nakata for lyrics and music.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
これからの未来 ほら たくさんのピース
組み立てるのはキミしだい 一つずつの
明日を生きる ココロのパズルとリズム
うまくは言えないけど
不思議と安心していられる感覚って
まるでパズルみたいだ
もうずっと前から
僕らは予約席
さあ両手つないで
きっと一つになれる
完成が見えていても
すんなりとはいかないね
それぞれが夢のカケラだね
